turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, my washer is acting up.
Got it — a washer. What's the brand and model, and what's happening?
Thanks. Can you tell me more about what's happening and when it started?
Clothes come out still wet after the cycle finishes, since this morning.
Understood, and any error codes or unusual sounds?
No error code or unusual sound, just that.
Here's what I'd try: double check the washer isn't overloaded and the settings match the load, then run a quick cycle to confirm the fix worked.
Happy to help — call back anytime if it's still acting up!

symptoms.description: clothes come out still wet after the cycle finishes

steps_given: Double check the washer isn't overloaded and the settings match the load.
Run a quick diagnostic cycle to confirm the fix worked.
